commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `/plugins` count-formatting helpers and route tests so paginated browse pages show lower-bound counts on the first page and `shown` counts after a cursor.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: mock `/plugins` loader data with one visible item and a `nextCursor`, and current main renders that page as an exact count even though pagination proves more results exist.
commands.review_followup: No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed because the prior pluralization issue was fixed and the remaining action is ordinary maintainer CI and merge review.

target.title: fix: clarify paginated plugin count
target.body:
## Summary
- Show plugin catalog counts as lower bounds when the API returns a next page.
- Keep previous-page views honest by labeling the visible page count as shown.
- Add route coverage for the paginated `1+` count display.

## Test Plan
- [x] `bun run test -- src/__tests__/packages-route.test.tsx`
- [x] `bun run format:check -- src/routes/plugins/index.tsx src/__tests__/packages-route.test.tsx`
- [x] `bunx oxlint --type-aware --tsconfig ./tsconfig.oxlint.json src/routes/plugins/index.tsx src/__tests__/packages-route.test.tsx`
- [ ] `bun run ci:unit` (local blocker: Vitest reports `Cannot find module '/Users/buns/.codex/worktrees/7b18/clawhub/convex/lib/moderationEngine.test.ts'` after running 219 suites / 2165 tests successfully; the file was restored and is not part of this diff)

## Manual Proof
- Opened `http://localhost:3000/plugins` in dev with the public read Convex backend; heading rendered as `Plugins 100+`.
target.author: bunsdev
